change.diff_summary: Added L2 weight decay 1e-5 on denoiser during pretrain

jury_reasoning.hypothesis: L2 regularization prevents overfitting to US-specific patterns.
jury_reasoning.mechanism: Added 1e-5 * sum(p^2) L2 penalty in diffusion_loss.
